@graph.name: TOXFREE® XTREM LSZH H07ZZ-F (AS)
@graph.description: The extra-flexible LSZH rubber cable for mobile service. ACCORDING TO: EN 50525-3-21. TOXFREE® XTREM LSZH H07ZZ-F (AS) is a flexible cable for mobile service, suitable for installations where low smoke and halogen free fumes under fire conditions are required. The use nominal voltage up to 1000 V is accepted in fixed protected assemblies. Suitable for installations where the cable must withstand medium mechanical stress, for machines in industrial and agricultural workshops, for motors and transportable machines on construction sites, for windmills and for agricultural applications.
@graph.category: Hardware > Building Materials > Wiring & Cables > Electrical Cables

audience.audienceType: Electrical Distributors, Electrical Installers, Engineers (Industrial Projects)

subjectOf.name: Technical Datasheet - TOXFREE® XTREM LSZH H07ZZ-F (AS)

additionalProperty.name: Conductor
additionalProperty.value: Electrolytic annealed copper, class 5 (flexible) according to EN 60228 and IEC 60228

additionalProperty.name: Insulation
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free thermosetting rubber, type EI8 according to EN 50363-5

additionalProperty.name: Outer Sheath
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free thermosetting flexible rubber, type EM8 according to EN 50363-6. Black colour.

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Service Temperature
additionalProperty.value: -40 (mobile service)

additionalProperty.name: Flame Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Flame non-propagation according to EN 60332-1 / IEC 60332-1

additionalProperty.name: Fire Non-Propagation
additionalProperty.value: Fire non-propagation according to EN 60332-3-24 / IEC 60332-3-24 and EN 50399

additionalProperty.name: CPR Classification
additionalProperty.value: B2ca-s1b, d1, a1 or Cca-s1b, d2, a1 (according to cross-section) according to EN 50575

additionalProperty.name: Halogen Free
additionalProperty.value: Halogen free according to EN 60754-1 / IEC 60754-1

additionalProperty.name: Low Corrosive Gases Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low corrosive gases emission according to UNE-EN 60754-2 / IEC 60754-2

additionalProperty.name: Low Smoke Emission
additionalProperty.value: Low smoke emission according to EN 61034 / IEC 61034

additionalProperty.name: Minimum Bending Radius
additionalProperty.value: 3x cable diameter < 12 mm; 4x cable diameter ≥ 12 mm

additionalProperty.name: Impact Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AG2 Medium severity

additionalProperty.name: Chemical & Oil Resistance
additionalProperty.value: Excellent

additionalProperty.name: Water Resistance
additionalProperty.value: AD7 Immersion

additionalProperty.name: Installation Conditions
additionalProperty.value: Open Air. In conduit.

additionalProperty.name: Standards and Approvals
additionalProperty.value: HAR, AENOR, CE

additionalProperty.name: Typical Applications
additionalProperty.value: Industrial use, Mobile use, Windmills
